description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:8 Docker image as the default image and caching the node_modules/ directory. Define three stages: lint, test, and build. Add a lint job in the lint stage that runs "npm install" then "npm run lint". Add a build job in the build stage that runs "npm run build" and a build:doc job in the same stage that runs "npm run build:doc". Add three test jobs in the test stage: test:node:7 uses the node:7 image, runs "npm install", "npm run build", and "npm test" and only runs when the variable $NIGHLTY is set; test:node:8 uses the node:8 image, runs the same three commands without any only condition; test:node:9 uses the node:9 image, runs the same three commands and only runs when $NIGHLTY is set. Set a variable ANSWER=42.
